NOTICE OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS FILED BY ATTORNEY GLASSBERG, HAROLD BURTON

JUDGE JOHN CONWAY, CLERK KAY PEEK, REPORTER JANET POND. RUTH AUERBACH, ESQ FOR PLTF AND PAUL NANNINI PRESENT; BRADLEY CASS, ESQ FOR DEFT AND BOBAK RAISSI PRESENT. A STIPULATED SETTLEMENT IS PLACED ON RECORD IN FAVOR OF PLTF. DEFT SHALL PAY PLTF $5,500 WITHIN TEN DAYS AND $500 WITHIN 30 DAYS THEREAFTER. DEFT SHALL EXECUTE A "RETURN TO FUNDS" LETTER. IF PAYMENT IS MADE, PLTF SHALL FILE A DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE; IF NOT, JUDGMENT SHALL BE ENTERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $9479.69. PLTF SHALL GIVE DEFT SEVEN CALENDAR DAYS NOTICE AND DEFT SHALL HAVE SEVEN CALENDAR DAYS FROM DATE OF LETTER TO CURE DEFAULT PRIOR TO ENTRY OF JUDGMENT. EACH PARTY TO PAY THEIR OWN COSTS.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE COURT TRIAL OF MAY-06-2002 OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL FILED
